name: LendNation
description_short: At 2095 N Jones Boulevard in Las Vegas, NV, LendNation provides same-day payday and title loans to local residents.
description_long:
Located at 2095 N Jones Boulevard in the northwest part of Las Vegas, NV, this LendNation storefront provides payday and title loans to local residents. The standalone branch is open Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM, making it convenient for workers seeking emergency cash during business hours. Stop by to apply in person or call ahead with questions about current loan terms.

The Las Vegas N Jones Boulevard location specializes in same-day payday loans and auto title loans, offering quick approval and funding for qualified borrowers. Contact the branch at 702-636-1271 to discuss rates, loan terms, and what documentation you'll need to bring. The staff can walk you through the application and answer questions about LendNation's lending products.

When unexpected expenses strike a Las Vegas resident, LendNation at this convenient N Jones location provides short-term financing when traditional banks won't. Be sure to bring a valid government ID, recent pay stubs or income verification, and proof of an active bank account. The branch is designed to process applications quickly so you get cash when you need it most.
address: 2095 N Jones Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89108

company_info.headquarters: 2095 N Jones Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89108

pros: Instant debit card funding provides same-day cash without ACH delays
4.8/5 Google rating from 161 reviews at this specific location
Operating since 2005 — 20+ years at the Bandera Road San Antonio location
Multiple loan structures available: single-pay payday, multi-pay installment, and title loans
Saturday hours (9 AM–1 PM) for borrowers who cannot visit Monday–Friday
Both online and in-store application options with instant pre-approval decisions
200+ locations across 11 states with check cashing and mobile banking cards also available
cons: Payday loans carry high APR typical of short-term lenders — cost is not disclosed in the website content provided
Title loans require a free-and-clear vehicle title as collateral, putting transportation at risk
Closed Sundays, limiting access for borrowers with weekend-only emergencies
Products and online lending availability vary by state — not all services accessible everywhere
Payday loan amounts capped around $1,000, insufficient for larger unexpected expenses
best_for: Borrowers needing $100–$1,000 quickly with no access to traditional credit
Vehicle owners seeking larger loan amounts using a paid-off car, truck, motorcycle, boat, ATV, or RV as collateral
Consumers who prefer in-person service with a long-established, locally reviewed storefront
Those who also need check cashing or a prepaid mobile banking card alongside borrowing
diagnosis: LendNation is best for borrowers facing an immediate, short-term cash shortfall who need funds the same day and cannot qualify for lower-cost alternatives such as a credit union PAL or personal loan. The primary caveat is cost: payday and title loans are among the most expensive legal credit products available, and using them repeatedly or for longer-term needs can significantly worsen a borrower's financial situation.
services: Online loan applications with instant pre-approval
meta_description: LendNation at 2095 N Jones Blvd, Las Vegas, NV. Same-day payday and title loans for residents.
